Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface ICloneHandler

  • public interface ICloneHandler
    Handles storing and spawning cloned entities. Clones are organized by numbered tabs (0-based) or named folders.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IEntity get​(int tab, String name, IWorld world)
      Returns a specific clone from a tab by name.
      IEntity get​(String folderName, String name, IWorld world)
      Returns a specific clone from a custom folder by name.
      IEntity[] getFolder​(String folderName, IWorld world)
      Returns all clones stored in the specified custom folder.
      String[] getFolders()
      Returns all custom folder names.
      IEntity[] getTab​(int tab, IWorld world)
      Returns all clones stored in the specified tab.
      boolean has​(int tab, String name)
      Checks whether a clone with the given name exists in the tab.
      boolean has​(String folderName, String name)
      Checks whether a clone exists in a custom folder.
      boolean hasFolder​(String folderName)
      Checks whether a custom folder exists.
      void remove​(int tab, String name)
      Removes a clone from the given tab.
      void remove​(String folderName, String name)
      Removes a clone from a custom folder.
      void set​(int tab, String name, IEntity entity)
      Stores an entity as a clone in the given tab with the specified name.
      void set​(String folderName, String name, IEntity entity)
      Stores an entity as a clone in a custom folder.
      IEntity spawn​(double x, double y, double z, int tab, String name, IWorld world)
      Spawns a clone at the given coordinates with default protection rules.
      IEntity spawn​(double x, double y, double z, int tab, String name, IWorld world, boolean ignoreProtection)
      Spawns a clone at the given coordinates.
      IEntity spawn​(double x, double y, double z, String folderName, String name, IWorld world)
      Spawns a clone from a custom folder with default protection rules.
      IEntity spawn​(double x, double y, double z, String folderName, String name, IWorld world, boolean ignoreProtection)
      Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given coordinates.
      IEntity spawn​(IPos pos, int tab, String name, IWorld world)
      Spawns a clone at the given position with default protection rules.
      IEntity spawn​(IPos pos, int tab, String name, IWorld world, boolean ignoreProtection)
      Spawns a clone at the given position.
      IEntity spawn​(IPos pos, String folderName, String name, IWorld world)
      Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given position with default protection rules.
      IEntity spawn​(IPos pos, String folderName, String name, IWorld world, boolean ignoreProtection)
      Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given position.

    • Method Detail

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(double x,
              double y,
              double z,
              int tab,
              String name,
              IWorld world,
              boolean ignoreProtection)
        Spawns a clone at the given coordinates.
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate.
        y - the y coordinate.
        z - the z coordinate.
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        ignoreProtection - whether to bypass spawn protection.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(IPos pos,
              int tab,
              String name,
              IWorld world,
              boolean ignoreProtection)
        Spawns a clone at the given position.
        Parameters:
        pos - the position.
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        ignoreProtection - whether to bypass spawn protection.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(double x,
              double y,
              double z,
              int tab,
              String name,
              IWorld world)
        Spawns a clone at the given coordinates with default protection rules.
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate.
        y - the y coordinate.
        z - the z coordinate.
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(IPos pos,
              int tab,
              String name,
              IWorld world)
        Spawns a clone at the given position with default protection rules.
        Parameters:
        pos - the position.
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • getTab

        IEntity[] getTab​(int tab,
                 IWorld world)
        Returns all clones stored in the specified tab.
        Parameters:
        tab - the tab index.
        world - the world context for entity creation.
        Returns:
        an array of entities in the tab.

      • get

        IEntity get​(int tab,
            String name,
            IWorld world)
        Returns a specific clone from a tab by name.
        Parameters:
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world context for entity creation.
        Returns:
        the entity, or null if not found.

      • has

        boolean has​(int tab,
            String name)
        Checks whether a clone with the given name exists in the tab.
        Parameters:
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        Returns:
        true if the clone exists; false otherwise.

      • set

        void set​(int tab,
         String name,
         IEntity entity)
        Stores an entity as a clone in the given tab with the specified name.
        Parameters:
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.
        entity - the entity to store.

      • remove

        void remove​(int tab,
            String name)
        Removes a clone from the given tab.
        Parameters:
        tab - the tab index.
        name - the clone name.

      • getFolders

        String[] getFolders()
        Returns all custom folder names.
        Returns:
        an array of folder names.

      • hasFolder

        boolean hasFolder​(String folderName)
        Checks whether a custom folder exists.
        Parameters:
        folderName - the folder name.
        Returns:
        true if the folder exists; false otherwise.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(double x,
              double y,
              double z,
              String folderName,
              String name,
              IWorld world,
              boolean ignoreProtection)
        Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given coordinates.
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate.
        y - the y coordinate.
        z - the z coordinate.
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        ignoreProtection - whether to bypass spawn protection.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(IPos pos,
              String folderName,
              String name,
              IWorld world,
              boolean ignoreProtection)
        Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given position.
        Parameters:
        pos - the position.
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        ignoreProtection - whether to bypass spawn protection.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(double x,
              double y,
              double z,
              String folderName,
              String name,
              IWorld world)
        Spawns a clone from a custom folder with default protection rules.
        Parameters:
        x - the x coordinate.
        y - the y coordinate.
        z - the z coordinate.
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • spawn

        IEntity spawn​(IPos pos,
              String folderName,
              String name,
              IWorld world)
        Spawns a clone from a custom folder at the given position with default protection rules.
        Parameters:
        pos - the position.
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world to spawn in.
        Returns:
        the spawned entity, or null on failure.

      • getFolder

        IEntity[] getFolder​(String folderName,
                    IWorld world)
        Returns all clones stored in the specified custom folder.
        Parameters:
        folderName - the folder name.
        world - the world context for entity creation.
        Returns:
        an array of entities in the folder.

      • get

        IEntity get​(String folderName,
            String name,
            IWorld world)
        Returns a specific clone from a custom folder by name.
        Parameters:
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        world - the world context for entity creation.
        Returns:
        the entity, or null if not found.

        boolean has​(String folderName,
            String name)
        Checks whether a clone exists in a custom folder.
        Parameters:
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        Returns:
        true if the clone exists; false otherwise.

        Stores an entity as a clone in a custom folder.
        Parameters:
        folderName - the folder name.
        name - the clone name.
        entity - the entity to store.

        void remove​(String folderName,

        name - the clone name.
